mapper.sql: vb.id, vb.order_no as orderNo, u.username as userName, u.real_name as realName, v.venue_name as venueName, vb.booking_date as bookingDate, vb.remark, v.location, vb.person_num as personNum, v.venue_type as venueType, vb.create_time

sql.where:
and u.username like CONCAT('%',#{userName},'%')
and u.real_name like CONCAT('%',#{realName},'%')
and v.venue_name like CONCAT('%',#{venueName},'%')
and v.location like CONCAT('%',#{location},'%')
and vb.is_deleted = 0

mapper.select:
select from venue_booking vb left join venue v on v.id = vb.venue_id left join user u on u.id = vb.user_id
order by vb.id
mapper.update: update venue_booking set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
